categories.name: HERE'S THE MATH YOU ASKED FOR

questions.clue: A perfect number is equal to the sum of its proper divisors; for example,28 = 1 + 2 + 4 +these 2 integers
i is used to represent the square root of -1, this type of "unreal" but handy-as-a-concept number
(4/3)pi r3 is the volume of one of these
This property of addition says(a + b) + c =a + (b + c)
